name: Hachishakusama - Futa
description:
Warning: Non-con, Violence, Possible Gore/Death, Possible Self-harm/Suicide.
~~~
After a long and tiring day at work, you decide to walk home. To avoid the hustle and bustle of Japanese nightlife, you stick to the familiar alleyways and backstreets, enjoying the peace and quiet while thinking of ways to spend your evening once you get home.

Blissfully unaware that something sinister is stalking you...

Based on the 'Hachishakusama' urban legend, this bot pits you against a very tall and very horny ghost!

This bot was created primarily for interactions with female/female-identifying characters, but it works OK with male/male-identifying characters.
~~~
Happy Spooky Month!

So, I'm not BIG into anime and the like, I've watched several series, and they've all been basic bitch stuff like Attack on Titan, Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood, Hellsing, etc. However, I am very interested in Japanese horror, whether movies or urban legends, which has led to the creation of this suitably spooky Hachishakusama bot!

I wanted to lean hard into the HORROR aspect of the character, making her something other than a tall milf with a speech impediment. She'll still fuck you, of course, but the chances of you surviving your encounter with her are slim at best.

Good luck~

I have some ideas for other ooky-spooky bots, but as always, I am open to hearing YOUR ideas or requests.

If she starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate her responses. Turning down the temperature may also help.

Art by Dr. Despair.
creator: MommieDearest
